systemStatus.headline: Sat Jul 11 7 AM run: all sources fresh. Toast (Fri Jul 10) and Sling (Sat Jul 11) arrived; Google Ads + Yelp Ads scraped live.
systemStatus.detail: Sat Jul 11 7 AM run -- full refresh. TOAST: Fri Jul 10 group summary in (net $7,190.00, down 28.5% vs Fri Jul 3, but Jul 3 was the July 4th holiday Friday). SLING: Sat Jul 11 schedule in (11 employees / 60.50 hrs / 0 uncovered / 0 OT). GOOGLE ADS: live scrape, Jul 10 spend $58.31, 0 conversions; new 'BHC Coffee | Search | P1 Launch' campaign live, 'World Cup HQ 2026' now paused. YELP ADS: live scrape, $130.54 spend Jul 1-10. TRIPADVISOR: no ad email in last 24h. Gaps: Toast void-$ and check count are not in the group-level email; Yelp bonus-budget remaining is not shown on the ads dashboard.

toast.source: GROUP Daily Performance Summary email (Fri Jul 10), parsed from HTML on Sat Jul 11 7 AM run.
toast.note: FRI JUL 10 group summary delivered 6:23 AM PT. Net $7,190.00 / Gross $7,321.40 / 289 guests / 177 orders / labor 19.8% of net. Down 28.5% vs SDLW (Fri Jul 3) and down 16.9% vs prior-4-Friday avg -- but Jul 3 was the July 4th holiday Friday ($10,051 net), so SDLW is an inflated baseline. Void $ amount and check count are not in the group-level email (location-level email arrives ~7:39 AM PT).

disapprovals.detail: Previously Disapproved (Destination not working HTTP 404 iOS + Copyrighted content, Jun 9). As of the Sat Jun 27 live scrape this campaign is fully 'Eligible' (no longer Limited) and served Jun 26 (913 impr, 38 clicks, $26.72). Appears fully recovered; confirm destination URL fix held.

googleAds.note_jul5: Sun Jul 5 4 AM run (email-only): 2 Google Ads report-ready notifications received Jul 4 ('Campaign performance' 5:31 AM PT, 'Brewhouse Daily Campaign Report' 8:48 AM PT). No disapproval or budget alerts in last 24h. Live dashboard NOT re-scraped this run; campaign/spend figures below are as of Sat Jul 4 ~7 AM. Open items carried forward: 'unauthorized activity' banner + new billing user (verify), World Cup HQ 2026 paused-but-spending (verify).
